description_long: This is a full-size mechanical keyboard with a sleek black chassis and individually backlit keys that display a vibrant RGB color spectrum. The keycaps are slightly contoured and feature translucent legends, allowing the colored lighting to shine through clearly. The keyboard includes a standard alphanumeric section, a function row, arrow keys, and a dedicated numeric keypad on the right. The surface appears to be made of hard plastic with a matte finish, while the keys themselves are slightly glossy due to the lighting. The underside likely contains rubber feet and possibly retractable stands for ergonomic adjustment. This keyboard is designed for desktop use and is suitable for both office and gaming environments.
description: A full-size RGB-backlit mechanical keyboard with a black chassis and translucent key legends, featuring a numeric keypad and vibrant lighting effects.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entire keyboard layout, including the alphanumeric section, function row, and numeric keypad, with RGB lighting visible across all keys.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the keycaps and the vividness of the RGB lighting, especially on the left side of the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the keyboard and the uniformity of the key heights, with RGB lighting visible from behind.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite end, emphasizing the right side and numeric keypad, with the RGB lighting gradient clearly visible.
